fixtures.reason: one hop, human root, allowlist scope, required expiry, real hash-chain binding
human root grants broad authority; sub-delegation narrows actions and targets (attenuation), real chained bindings
prefire key 'sovereignty_capsule' nested inside a party must be rejected by the recursive forbidden-field guard
unknown root field must fail closed (additionalProperties:false)
the root hop's 'from' party is an agent -- authority cannot originate with an agent
binding is not a 64-char lowercase hex SHA-256 digest
hops must be a non-empty array
party kind outside the closed enum {human, agent}
expires_at is not an ISO-8601 datetime with timezone
